class EnlightenSystemsAPI
  def initialize(api_key)
    @api_key = api_key
  end

  def fetch_performance_data(system_id)
    # Implementation to fetch performance data
  end
end

class PVWattsAPI
  def initialize(api_key)
    @api_key = api_key
  end

  def estimate_energy_production(system_params)
    # Implementation to estimate energy production
  end
end

# Example usage
enlighten_api = EnlightenSystemsAPI.new('your_api_key')
performance_data = enlighten_api.fetch_performance_data('system_id')

pvwatts_api = PVWattsAPI.new('your_api_key')
energy_production = pvwatts_api.estimate_energy_production(system_params)

# Minimal unit tests
require 'minitest/autorun'

class TestEnlightenSystemsAPI < Minitest::Test
  def setup
    @api = EnlightenSystemsAPI.new('test_api_key')
  end

  def test_fetch_performance_data
    result = @api.fetch_performance_data('test_system_id')
    assert_instance_of Hash, result
  end
end

class TestPVWattsAPI < Minitest::Test
  def setup
    @api = PVWattsAPI.new('test_api_key')
  end

  def test_estimate_energy_production
    system_params = { size: 5, location: 'test_location' }
    result = @api.estimate_energy_production(system_params)
    assert_instance_of Hash, result
  end
end
